story.text:
# 🚪 myterms (MyTerms Alliance kit)
**gateway** · shared · knowledge

The IEEE Std 7012-2025 founding-member application package (Customer Commons MyTerms Alliance) + dual-agent harness instance #2 — the first real-bus instance, orchestrating the two MyTerms browser extensions (mysword prover ⊥ mymage proposer) through held-out gates: the IEEE-7012 registry, constellation-hash witness, bilateral immutable record. Local sibling repo; real-bus wiring over the ceremony channel pending.

## Edges out

- *implements* → [[Dual-Agent Harness (v1.0)]]
- *requires* → [[mysword (Swordsman · Privacy Blade)]]
- *requires* → [[mymage (Mage · Spellbook Projection)]]
- *relates_to* → [[Browser Privacy]]
